famous quote:
"The mark of Friendship is not that help will be given when the pinch comes (of course it will) but that, having been given, it makes no difference at all."
-- C.S. Lewis (The Four Loves)
Interview Text:
Healing or Talking:

One day a friend said he said he wanted to take a trip to Kansas City (or some other city a couple hours away) and just see if we can find some people who need healing. 

It turned out we met a man waiting at a crosswalk with us who had just had a fight with his wife and he had left to think about things. He was considering just getting into his car and driving away from it all forever. 

My friend kept asking if he had any pains in his body that we could try to heal, but I felt that this guy just needs emotional healing. He needs to talk and be heard and be ministered to in that way. I felt that it was his heart that was sick. 

-Raw Spoon (from Miracles in America)
Music Video Instructions: Ponder all that we relentlessly strive for and the fullness God has waiting for us when we simply turn to him.
